description: Replace MOCK_* component data in the migrated apps with live data from the wired API (FEAT-002). The audit found components hardwired to MOCK constants ignoring the backend (e.g. quantneon BroadcastChannel.tsx, CollabInvite.tsx, guides.tsx). This partially overlaps Phase 87 (mock-debt.csv) but covers the orphaned-app components specifically.
steps: Grep each migrated app for MOCK_, generateMock, hardcoded fixture arrays (cross-ref .agents/state/mock-debt.csv rows for quantube/quantneon/quantmax/quantedits).
For each, replace the fixture with a React Query hook hitting the proxied API; show loading/empty/error states via @quant/shared-ui (LoadingState, etc.).
Specifically fix quantneon: BroadcastChannel.tsx, CollabInvite.tsx, guides.tsx (and feed/reels/stories/explore) to read from backend instead of MOCK_*.
Keep a single seed/fixture path only behind an explicit demo mode (e.g. @quant/onboarding demo mode), not as the default render.
Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm build; manually verify a list view renders from API (or a test with a mocked fetch).
acceptance_criteria: No migrated-app component renders MOCK_* as its default data source
List/detail views fetch from the wired API with loading/empty/error states
Demo-mode fixtures (if any) are explicitly gated, not default
